name: TuriX CUA
description: Run high-risk local desktop automation tasks through a controlled TuriX-CUA worker.

runtime.mode.label: TuriX runtime mode
runtime.mode.help: Use managed for CrawClaw-owned runtime provisioning, or external to point at an existing TuriX-CUA checkout.

runtime.projectDir.label: TuriX project directory
runtime.projectDir.help: Required for external runtime mode. Points at a TuriX-CUA checkout.

runtime.pythonPath.label: TuriX Python executable
runtime.pythonPath.help: Python executable used to run examples/main.py.

models.*.apiKeyEnv.label: Provider API key env var
models.*.apiKeyEnv.help: Environment variable name used for the TuriX model provider API key.

allowRemoteRequests.label: Allow channel-originated desktop runs
allowRemoteRequests.help: Keep disabled unless you explicitly want remote chat channels to trigger local desktop automation after approval.

stripReasoningTags.label: Strip leading reasoning tags
stripReasoningTags.help: Remove leading <think>...</think> blocks from TuriX model responses before TuriX parses structured output.
